common.tagline: File a Complaint Against Any Company

home.heroSubtitle: We help you file a structured complaint and get results. Free.
home.searchPlaceholder: Which company do you have an issue with?
home.searchNoResults: No companies found. Try a different name.
home.step1Desc: Select the company and describe your issue
home.step2Desc: AI creates a professional complaint letter for you
home.step3Desc: Send directly to the company and track their response

categories.title: What's your issue?
categories.subtitle: Select the category that best describes your problem

rights.title: Know your rights
rights.subtitle: Here's what the law says about your situation
rights.disclaimer: Note: This is general guidance only, not legal advice.
rights.backBtn: My issue doesn't apply — Go back

complaintForm.title: Tell us what happened
complaintForm.whatHappenedPlaceholder: Describe your issue in detail. Include order numbers, dates, and any communication you've had with the company.
complaintForm.evidenceHelp: Upload up to 3 files (JPEG, PNG, WebP, PDF). Max 5MB each.

draft.title: Review your complaint
draft.subtitle: We've drafted a professional complaint based on your input. Feel free to edit it.
draft.editHint: You can edit the text above before sending

send.title: Review and send
send.loginRequired: Please log in to send your complaint
send.successMessage: Your complaint has been sent to {company}. We'll track their response.
send.visibilityPublicDesc: सार्वजनिक शिकायतें तेज़ी से हल होती हैं। अन्य लोग दबाव बढ़ाने के लिए समर्थन कर सकते हैं।
send.visibilityPrivateDesc: केवल आप और कंपनी ही यह शिकायत देख सकते हैं। आपकी व्यक्तिगत जानकारी हमेशा सुरक्षित रहती है।

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience.

feed.empty: अभी तक कोई सार्वजनिक शिकायत नहीं। पहले बनें!

cases.resolved: यह मामला हल हो गया है
cases.markResolved: हल के रूप में चिह्नित करें
cases.shareEncourageDesc: अपनी शिकायत दोस्तों और सोशल मीडिया पर साझा करें। अधिक दृश्यता का मतलब कंपनी पर अधिक दबाव।
